2606.04867.title: AICompanionBench: Benchmarking LLMs-as-Judges for AI Companion Safety
2606.04867.paper_summary: As AI companion platforms such as Replika and Character.AI rapidly grow, concerns about unsafe human-AI interactions have intensified. This study introduces AICompanionBench, to our knowledge the first publicly available benchmark dataset of human-AI companion conversations annotated with fine-grained safety risk categories. The dataset contains 2,123 real-world Replika conversations collected from Reddit and annotated through human-AI collaboration across nine categories: sexual behavior, antisocial behavior, physical aggression, verbal aggression, substance abuse, self-harm and suicide, control, manipulation, and no-harm. Using this benchmark, we evaluate 20 state-of-the-art open-source and closed-source LLMs under an LLM-as-judge framework for detecting unsafe interactions. Results show substantial variation in model performance, with stronger models achieving high overall accuracy but still struggling with nuanced categories such as manipulation, as well as benign conversations that are incorrectly identified as harmful. Our findings suggest that while current LLMs can effectively detect explicit harmful content, they remain limited in identifying implicit unsafe interactions. Overall, our work contributes a new benchmark dataset for AI companionship safety research and offers insights into monitoring AI companion systems using LLMs. The dataset is publicly available at: https://github.com/anonymousresearcher2026/AICompanionBench/blob/main/AICompanionBench.xlsx
2606.04867.paper_summary_zh: 隨著AI伴侶平台如Replika和Character.AI迅速成長，對於不安全的人類與AI互動的擔憂也加劇了。這項研究介紹了AICompanionBench，據我們所知，這是第一個公開可用的標準數據集，包含標註有細緻安全風險類別的人類與AI伴侶對話。該數據集包含2,123個來自Reddit的真實Replika對話，並通過人類與AI的合作在九個類別中進行標註：性行為、反社會行為、身體攻擊、言語攻擊、藥物濫用、自我傷害和自殺、控制、操縱以及無傷害。利用這個基準，我們在LLM作為評判者的框架下評估了20個最先進的開源和閉源LLM，以檢測不安全的互動。結果顯示模型性能有顯著變化，更強的模型在整體準確性上表現良好，但在操縱等細微類別以及被錯誤識別為有害的良性對話上仍然存在困難。我們的研究結果表明，雖然當前的LLM能有效檢測明確的有害內容，但在識別隱含的不安全互動方面仍然有限。總體而言，我們的工作為AI伴侶安全研究提供了一個新的基準數據集，並提供了使用LLM監控AI伴侶系統的見解。該數據集可在以下網址公開獲取：https://github.com/anonymousresearcher2026/AICompanionBench/blob/main/AICompanionBench.xlsx
2606.04867.author: Yanjing Ren et.al.
2606.04867.authors: Yanjing Ren, Reza Ebrahimi, TengTeng Ma
